title: bupleurum fruticescens subsp. balansae
intro: Bupleurum fruticescens subsp. balansae, also known as Chinese thorowax or Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The health benefits of Bupleurum include its ability to improve liver function, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Bupleurum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
